import csv
import numpy as np

data = []
with open('alphasyn_gaspar2017_03um_seed_all/fit.tsv') as f:
    reader = csv.reader(f, delimiter='\t')
    header = next(reader)
    print('Columns:', header[:3], '...')
    for row in reader:
        if row:
            data.append([float(v) for v in row])

data = np.array(data)
print('Shape:', data.shape)
print('Time range:', data[:,0].min(), '-', data[:,0].max())
print('First few time values:', data[:5,0])
print('Last few time values:', data[-5:,0])
print('y range per conc:')
for i in range(1, 9):
    print(f'  col {i}: min={data[:,i].min():.4f}, max={data[:,i].max():.4f}')
"

python3 -c "
import csv
import numpy as np

# Load the actual regression dataset as the evaluator does
import sys
sys.path.insert(0, '.')
from alphasyn_gaspar2017_03um_seed_all.evaluator import load_alphasyn_data

X_train, X_val, y_train, y_val = load_alphasyn_data()
print('X_train shape:', X_train.shape)
print('X_val shape:', X_val.shape)
print('Time range:', X_train[:,0].min(), '-', X_train[:,0].max())
print('Conc range:', X_train[:,1].min(), '-', X_train[:,1].max())
print('y range:', y_train.min(), '-', y_train.max())
print('Unique concentrations:', np.unique(X_train[:,1]))

# Look at some data by concentration
for c in np.unique(X_train[:,1]):
    mask = X_train[:,1] == c
    t = X_train[mask, 0]
    y = y_train[mask]
    idx = np.argsort(t)
    t, y = t[idx], y[idx]
    print(f'  conc={c}uM: t=[{t[0]:.2f}..{t[-1]:.2f}], y=[{y[0]:.4f}..{y[-1]:.4f}], n={len(t)}')
"

python3 -c "
import numpy as np
import sys
sys.path.insert(0, '.')
from alphasyn_gaspar2017_03um_seed_all.evaluator import load_alphasyn_data

X_train, X_val, y_train, y_val = load_alphasyn_data()

# Look at the shape of the curves more carefully
# For each concentration, find when y crosses 0.5 (half-time)
for c in np.unique(X_train[:,1]):
    mask = X_train[:,1] == c
    t = X_train[mask, 0]
    y = y_train[mask]
    idx = np.argsort(t)
    t, y = t[idx], y[idx]
    # Find approximate half-time
    half_idx = np.argmin(np.abs(y - 0.5))
    print(f'  conc={c:5.1f}uM: t_half~{t[half_idx]:.2f}, y0={y[0]:.4f}, y_end={y[-1]:.4f}')
"

function.arguments:
{"command": "python3 -c "
import numpy as np
import sys
sys.path.insert(0, '.')
from alphasyn_gaspar2017_03um_seed_all.evaluator import load_alphasyn_data

X_train, X_val, y_train, y_val = load_alphasyn_data()

# Look at the shape of the curves more carefully
# For each concentration, find when y crosses 0.5 (half-time)
for c in np.unique(X_train[:,1]):
    mask = X_train[:,1] == c
    t = X_train[mask, 0]
    y = y_train[mask]
    idx = np.argsort(t)
    t, y = t[idx], y[idx]
    # Find approximate half-time
    half_idx = np.argmin(np.abs(y - 0.5))
    print(f'  conc={c:5.1f}uM: t_half~{t[half_idx]:.2f}, y0={y[0]:.4f}, y_end={y[-1]:.4f}')
"
"}
